text.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuning Data Preparation — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: What is the source data format?

branch.question: What is the fine-tune format target?

branch.conclusion: Use chat schema with messages array. system + user + assistant per row.
Use prompt + completion legacy schema (older models only).
Use DPO schema with messages + non_preferred_output. Apply DPO methodology.
Skip conversion. Run validator. Token-count + split if not already done.

example.p: Support-tickets CSV (4200 rows) → chat format target → CSV branch → r1-jsonl-schema → train/val 80/20 → 3360/840.
